<div class="kg-card kg-signup-card kg-width-regular kg-style-light">
  <h2 class="kg-signup-card-heading">Join the newsletter</h2>
  <p class="kg-signup-card-subheading">One short digest per week.</p>
  <form class="kg-signup-card-form" data-members-form="signup">
    <input class="kg-signup-card-input" type="email" placeholder="you@example.com" required data-kg-i18n-placeholder="Your email address" data-members-email>
    <button class="kg-signup-card-button" type="submit" data-kg-i18n="Subscribe" data-members-submit>Subscribe</button>
  </form>
</div>
